FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Drought
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Weeks without rain have dried up water sources. Crops wilt in the fields and animals grow thin. The earth cracks beneath a merciless sun.
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.optionDescription: The drought deepens. Wells run dry and the harvest withers. The settlement looks to you for a solution.

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Dig irrigation wells. A permanent investment in the settlement's future.
Ration water strictly. Everyone tightens their belt.
Abandon the worst-hit fields. Focus on what we can save.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Irrigation Wells Dug
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Deep wells now tap into underground water reserves. The drought's grip loosens, and green shoots return to the fields. A wise investment.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Water Rationed
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Strict rationing keeps the settlement alive, but barely. Workers grumble over meager portions as they watch the sky for clouds that never come.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Fields Abandoned
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The outer fields lie fallow, given up to the parched earth. What remains is enough to sustain the settlement, but morale has taken a heavy blow.
